meta.githubCommitMessage:
Update favicon to heart V

Switched tab icon to a heart with the letter V and updated page title/meta to reflect Viangy branding, including favicon import.

X-Lovable-Edit-ID: edt-11c9fa09-bbd8-44dc-a11f-448ceb6c85b8
Co-authored-by: Bleutonik <254370175+Bleutonik@users.noreply.github.com>

Add drag and drop to Kanban

Implemented drag and drop functionality for the Tablero and Parrilla views, allowing users to move tasks and content items between columns. This enhances the Kanban board experience on mobile by enabling intuitive reordering of items.

Update blog images to real pics

Replaced placeholder gradient images with real quinceañera and event photos in the blog cards; updated imports to use new assets. Updated Blog.tsx to reference portfolio-quinceanera.jpg and portfolio-event.jpg.

Añadió Blog en menú móvil

Se incorporó enlace Blog en MobileNav y se mostró el botón de Blog al lado del selector de idioma en el header móvil, junto con el icono BookOpen. También se actualizó Header para incluir acceso rápido a /blog y se ajustó el toggler de idioma para móvil.

Replaced placeholder gradient images with real quinceañera and event photos in the blog cards; updated imports to use new assets. Updated Blog.tsx to reference portfolio-quinceanera.jpg and portfolio-event.jpg.

fix: remove verbose webhook logging to prevent Railway rate limit

Replaced JSON.stringify(cuerpo) with event type summary to avoid hitting
Railway's 500 logs/sec limit that was dropping 255+ messages per deploy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Parrilla de Contenido page with weekly, calendar, and table views

Add Parrilla de Contenido page with weekly, calendar, and table views

- Backend: /api/content CRUD route with role-based access
- Frontend: ContentGrid.jsx with 3 views (Semanal, Calendario, Tabla)
- Rich modal form with Planificación + Ejecución tabs
- Stats bar by estado
- Nav link added to Dashboard and ContentGrid
